summary: Made one surgical exit-continuity edit. The chapter ending now lightly seeds the receipt stack and Gabe's worn dock-union shirt so Chapter 6's morning table image reads as a direct domestic continuation. The opening already differed structurally from the adjacent opening, so it was left intact. No style-bible calibration example lines were present verbatim in the chapter.
edits: Seeded old receipts and a stub pencil at the table in the final paragraph to bridge into Chapter 6's receipt-sorting opening.
Seeded Gabe's faded green dock-union shirt in the closing image to align with Lin wearing it at the start of Chapter 6.
Kept the opening unchanged because its stairwell arrival structure already differs from the adjacent waking-at-table opening.
